faq.heading: Frequently Asked
faq.subheading: Find quick answers to the most common support questions

contactBox.title: Still Have Questions?
contactBox.text: Still have questions? Feel free to get in touch with us today!

questions.question: What types of processes can you automate?
questions.answer: We specialize in automating repetitive workflows across operations, marketing, sales, and customer support using AI and custom logic.

questions.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use your service?
questions.answer: Not at all. We handle the technical implementation from end to end, providing you with simple, ready-to-use interfaces.

questions.question: Can you integrate with our existing tools?
questions.answer: Yes, we integrate seamlessly with most popular CRMs, marketing platforms, and operational tools through APIs and webhooks.

questions.question: How long does implementation take?
questions.answer: Depending on complexity, typical implementations range from 2 to 6 weeks, including testing and team training.

questions.question: Is your AI secure and compliant?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Security is our top priority. We use enterprise-grade encryption and adhere strictly to industry data compliance standards.

solutions.heading: Innovative

items.title: Vidyum School ERP
items.shortDescription: Complete digital transformation for educational institutions.
items.description: Vidyum School ERP is a comprehensive, cloud-based management system designed to automate administrative tasks, streamline operations, and enhance the educational experience for students, teachers, and parents alike.
items.fullDescription: Vidyum School ERP stands at the forefront of educational technology, providing a unified platform that bridges the gap between administration and learning. Our system is built on a scalable, secure architecture that handles everything from the first inquiry to the final graduation. With real-time data insights, automated workflows, and a user-friendly interface, Vidyum empowers schools to operate with unprecedented efficiency and precision. Whether it's managing complex fee structures, tracking school transport in real-time, or facilitating seamless parent-teacher communication, Vidyum is the ultimate partner for modern schools striving for excellence.

pricing.heading: Choose your
pricing.subheading: Flexible pricing for institutions of all sizes.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for small schools starting their digital journey.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Comprehensive tools for growing educational institutions.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Full-scale solution for large campuses and chains.

faq.heading: Common
faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about Vidyum.

questions.question: What is Vidyum School ERP?
questions.answer: Vidyum is a comprehensive, cloud-based school management system that automates all administrative and academic processes.

questions.question: Is my school's data secure?
questions.answer: Yes, we use enterprise-grade encryption and secure cloud storage to ensure your data is always protected and backed up.

questions.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
questions.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade your plan at any time as your institution's needs grow.

questions.question: Do you provide on-site training?
questions.answer: Yes, we provide both online and on-site training for your staff to ensure a smooth transition to Vidyum.

modules.title: Student Dashboard
modules.description: A centralized hub for students to access attendance, grades, assignments, and school announcements in real-time.

modules.title: Parents Dashboard
modules.description: Real-time updates for parents regarding their child's attendance, grades, fees, and school events.

modules.title: Teacher & Staff Dashboard
modules.description: Personalized portal for teachers to manage student attendance, academic progress, and communication.

modules.title: HR & Payroll
modules.description: Manage staff records, salaries, leaves, and performance tracking in one integrated system.

modules.title: Attendance Module
modules.description: Streamline daily attendance tracking for students and staff with automated notifications and reports.

modules.title: Fees & Finance
modules.description: Simplify fee collection with online payment integration, automated invoicing, and detailed financial reporting.

modules.title: Examination System
modules.description: Automate result processing, generate customizable report cards, and track academic progress over time.

modules.title: Library Management
modules.description: Streamline book tracking, reservations, and inventory management with an automated digital catalog system.

modules.title: Class & Academic Module
modules.description: Manage schedules, subject allocations, and lesson plans with ease, ensuring a smooth academic flow.

modules.title: Transport Management
modules.description: Ensure student safety with real-time vehicle tracking, route optimization, and automated transport fee alerts.
